name: Lockable Key Cabinet / Key Station
shortDescription: Wall-mounted, lockable cabinet keeping site keys organised and accounted for.
longDescription: A powder-coated steel cabinet with a transparent acrylic door and its own lock, holding numbered hooks for site, plant or vehicle keys so nothing goes missing and everything has a traceable location. Sized from small 10-key stations up to large 500-key double-door units for facilities managing a large key inventory.

images.alt: Lockable Key Cabinet / Key Station supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara

specs.label: Body
specs.value: Powder-coated MS sheet, transparent acrylic front, lockable
